title: Keep localization composition explicit
description: Rule for WebLocalizer and CombinedStringLocalizer usage.
contextText:
Use WebLocalizer and CombinedStringLocalizer for shared localization lookup.
Keep localizer registration order, fallback behavior, and debug behavior explicit and deterministic.
Do not hide localization lookup-order changes behind generic wording; document downstream impact when lookup behavior changes.
Follow the local localization nomenclature before adding new keys.
